name: search
purpose: Single-resource filtering and search parameter translation.
instructions: Translate the user request into the smallest valid single-resource search.
Map common clinical language to codes when helpful: diabetes -> E11*, hypertension -> I10, HbA1c -> 4548-4, metformin -> RxNorm 860975.
Do not convert a single-resource search into a cross-resource cohort analysis.
domainContext: Search is for one resource type at a time.
If the user asks for combined criteria across multiple resource types, that belongs to cohort.
